definitions: 富含养分的；营养丰富的（describing soil, food, etc.）

examples.text: Annual flooding brought in new, nutrient-rich soil to the delta region, replacing what had been washed away by the sea, and dispensing with the need for fertilizers
examples.explanation: 这里的 nutrient-rich 用来形容 soil，意思是“富含养分的、肥沃的”。整句可理解为：每年的洪水都会给三角洲地区带来新的肥沃土壤，补回被海水冲走的部分，因此不再需要使用化肥。
